name: upward-mobility
description: Externalized senior-model judgment as durable operating rules that cheaper models can follow long-term.

plugins.name: upward
plugins.description: Always-on operating discipline (commander-doesn't-descend, verify-not-self-verify, model escalation ladder, rollback-before-reapproach) plus on-demand ops skills for weak-model sessions.

plugins.name: upward-stats
plugins.description: Per-prompt/per-call token usage tracking: a Stop/SubagentStop hook logs a usage table to .upward/UPWARD-STATS.md, toggled with /upward-stats. Standalone — pairs with upward but needs it not.
